title: activator
description: Stable up to date lightweight modpack which fully based on Quilt.
body:
# activator ⚡🍎 #### Simple way to boost FPS. #### QOL mods (1.3+) #### Updating every **Friday** and _Sunday_. pre-X. updates may be released every day
Features

#### Powered by Quilt #### No chat reports and telemetry #### Doesn't use unstable mods #### Updates fast

⭐
